message:
fix(http): correct identity encoding test expectation after RFC 9110 fix

The previous commit changed identity to default q=1.0 per RFC 9110,
but the test still expected Deflate to win over Identity when *;q=0.5.
With the fix, identity (q=1.0 implicit default) beats deflate (q=0.5
from wildcard), so the test expectation is updated to Identity.

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with latest state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
